note: seq=93: publish hunter-stats.json so the V5 Lead Hunter panel stops 'PENDING FEED'. Real box numbers: prospects_total (handoff-eligible = crawlable website), qualified (qa_status='pass'), checked, pass_rate, leads_per_hour (delta of qualified). 5-min timer. Verified complete (59L, __main__, ends clean, compiles).

steps.note: seq=93: hunter-stats.json feed for V5 Lead Hunter panel.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_hunter_stats.py':'956f238f8ccd74ec576dc1eed612a3c76e257190b7643b261fb636f798a7190d'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('hunter sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS hunter-stats feed (prospects/qualified/leads-hr for V5 Lead Hunter)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=12
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_hunter_stats.py
TimeoutStartSec=50

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS hunter-stats timer (5min)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=40s
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-hunter-stats.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-hunter-stats.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-hunter-stats.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-hunter-stats.service']); print('hunter-stats live')"
